features: Comprehensive Grooming Kit - This 6pc horse stuff grooming kit includes essential tools like a hoof pick with brush and horse hair brush bricklayer. It is designed for thorough grooming, ensuring your horse looks and feels its best every day.

High-Quality Brushes - Our horse hair shoe brush and horse brush are crafted from durable materials, providing effective grooming. The grooming kit includes horse grooming brushes that make it a must-have for all horse accessories collectors.

Versatile Grooming Tools - The grooming kit features a horse grooming bag with a hoof oil brush and dandy brush for various grooming needs. Ideal for equestrian gifts, it ensures comprehensive care for your horse's mane, tail, body, and hooves.

Convenient Grooming Solution - Packaged in a compact grooming bag, this grooming kit for horses is an ideal choice for horse grooming and horse riding equipment storage. It includes necessary horse equipment like hoof picks for horses and a curry comb.

Ideal Gift for Horse Lovers - The grooming kit equestrian set is perfect for those seeking equestrian gifts. With horse brushes and a dog grooming bag included, it's a versatile collection of horse brushes for grooming and hairdressing bags for equipment.
description: Product Description Equi-Neat 6Pc Horse Grooming Kit This horse grooming kit includes every essential brush and tool needed to clean, detangle, and polish your horse’s entire body — from hooves to mane and tail. Designed for full grooming routines, it’s the ultimate all-in-one set for horse owners and riders. Multi-purpose Grooming Kit Perfectly suited for horses and ponies, this horse grooming set helps remove dirt, sweat, and loose hair with ease. Great for post-ride cleaning, regular stable care, or preparing for shows — your horse will look polished and feel refreshed. Previous page Quick Dirt Removal Dandy Brush The dandy brush features stiff bristles that effectively remove mud and dirt. For Hoof Cleaning Hoof Pick and Brush Keep the horse’s hooves clean and healthy with this sturdy hoof pick! Removes dirt, stones, and mud! For Hair Grooming Comb and Mane/Tail Brush Perfect for maintaining smooth, shiny manes and tails after rides or baths. For Removing Sweat/Water Sweat Scraper After a wash or workout, use this sweat scraper for horses to remove excess water and sweat. For Removing Fine Dusts Soft Body Brush The body brush horse is ideal for removing fine dust and adding a soft shine to your horse’s coat. Next page 1 Dandy Brush 2 Hoof Pick and Brush 3 Comb and Mane/Tail Brush 4 Sweat Scraper 5 Soft Body Brush Versatile Horse Grooming Kit Perfect for Mane, Tail, Body and Hoof. Overall Horse Grooming Set! Give your horse the ultimate care with this 6Pc Horse Grooming Kit, a complete grooming kit for horses that includes every essential horse brush and grooming accessory you need. Designed for everyday use, this professional horse grooming kit set ensures your horse, pony, or equestrian companion always looks their best. This all-in-one grooming kit horse comes with a hoof pick, mane and tail brush, dandy brush, body brush horse, sweat scraper, and curry comb. What items are included in this horse grooming kit? This 6Pc horse grooming kit includes a hoof pick, curry comb, dandy brush, body brush horse, mane and tail brush, and sweat scraper—essential horse accessories for complete horse care. Can I store this kit in a grooming bag or grooming box? Yes! The tools fit perfectly in any horse grooming bag, grooming box, or horse grooming box, making it convenient for stable, home, or travel use. Is this grooming kit suitable for ponies as well as horses? Absolutely! This pony grooming kit works perfectly for both ponies and horses, keeping coats clean, shiny, and healthy. Are these horse brushes durable enough for everyday use? Yes, each tool in this horse grooming kit set is made with durable materials and strong bristles for long-lasting performance, ideal for daily grooming. Can this grooming kit be used as an equestrian gift? Definitely! This horse grooming kit makes a wonderful equestrian gift for horse lovers, riders, or anyone who keeps horse stuff and grooming tools organized in a grooming bag or horse grooming box.
